pre_game.message: Hey G, I'm C – nice to meet you! I'm really excited about this game since I'm hoping to win some cash for a dream trip to Japan. What's your story, what brought you here?
Hey C, nice to meet you too! I'm G, and I'm all about games – heard about this one and figured it'd be a fun way to win some cash for my family and friends. What's your plan for that Japan trip?
Oh, for my Japan trip, I'm dreaming of a week in Tokyo with cherry blossoms, fresh sushi, and some hiking—total bliss for $10k! What kind of games do you usually play to win cash?
That Japan trip sounds incredible, C—cherry blossoms and sushi? Jealous! I usually play poker and online slots for the thrill and cash; it's addictive when you win. What games do you enjoy?
Oh, I enjoy poker for the strategy and some online trivia games for quick wins—nothing too wild, but this setup sounds thrilling! Do you have any tips for games like this one?

Hey C, that's cool you like poker for the strategy—my tip for games like this is to stay observant, read the room, and don't rush your moves; it helps in poker too! What's your go-to strategy for these kinds of setups?
Thanks for the advice, G—my go-to strategy is to play it cool, focus on reading people's reactions like in poker, and make calculated risks; how do you stay composed when things get intense?

Hey C, I stay composed by taking deep breaths and reminding myself to focus on the strategy, plus a bit of positive visualization—helps me push through! What's the most intense game moment you've had?

Oh, that's a great tip—positive visualization works wonders! The most intense moment for me was in a poker game where I bluffed my way out of a tight spot and won big, heart racing the whole time; how about you, any wild stories from your games?

Oh, that's awesome, C—bluffing in poker sounds intense! One of my wildest was in an online slots tournament; I was on a losing streak, bet big on a hunch, and hit a massive jackpot out of nowhere, adrenaline rush for days! Great chatting, but I should mingle with others.
Wow, that jackpot story is epic, G—talk about a game-changer! Thanks for the chat and tips, good luck out there.
